author: Peter Miller (pfmiller0) — fork maintained by Mads Kristensen
releaseNotes: Local-test fork of pfmiller0/Hubitat PurpleAir AQI Virtual Sensor v1.3.2. Applies 3 Trinity-audited bug fixes: AQ&U string mismatch, LRAPA/Woodsmoke case-sensitivity + wrong PM2.5 field, failCount operator-precedence breaking exponential backoff. This fork is TEMPORARY — intended for local validation before submitting fixes as a PR to pfmiller0/Hubitat.
